data.name: AutoScrollNote
data.value: Auto-scroll pauses while details are open.

data.name: Card1Description
data.value: Roof systems that combine solar panels, storage, and weather-aware controls.

data.name: Card1DetailText
data.value: Smart solar rooftops turn homes and schools into small clean-energy hubs. Sensors can track sunlight, batteries can save extra power for the evening, and software can shift appliance use to the best hours.

data.name: Card2Description
data.value: Offshore turbines placed on floating platforms to reach stronger winds.

data.name: Card2DetailText
data.value: Floating wind farms can be installed in deeper coastal waters where wind is steadier. They expand clean energy production without competing for city land and can be paired with ports and hydrogen projects.

data.name: Card3Description
data.value: Multi-level indoor growing systems that save land and shorten delivery routes.

data.name: Card3DetailText
data.value: Vertical farms use stacked shelves, LED lighting, and controlled watering to grow food near consumers. That can reduce transport emissions, save water, and give cities more resilient local food production.

data.name: Card4Description
data.value: Specialized labs that recover lithium, nickel, and cobalt from old batteries.

data.name: Card4DetailText
data.value: Battery recycling labs help keep critical minerals in circulation. Instead of throwing used batteries away, the materials are sorted, cleaned, and reused in new energy storage systems or electric vehicles.

data.name: Card5Description
data.value: Autonomous surface devices that collect floating waste and map pollution.

data.name: Card5DetailText
data.value: Ocean-cleaning drones can patrol harbors and coastlines, gather plastic waste, and send live data about pollution hotspots. Teams can then target cleanup work faster and protect marine ecosystems.

data.name: HeroSubtitle
data.value: Swipe through five practical concepts shaping cleaner cities, energy, and oceans.

data.name: SectionLabel
data.value: Tap a card to open a popup with details.
